issues.title: expires_at DateTimeField + DateInput type mismatch
issues.attack: DateTimeField with date-only widget creates semantic mismatch: midnight expiry means same-day codes are immediately invalid. Gemini incorrectly escalated to CRITICAL claiming runtime failure.
issues.response: Verified DateTimeField accepts date-only input (no CRITICAL). Semantic mismatch is valid — change to DateField + clean_expires_at() with end-of-day conversion.

issues.title: expires_at missing future-date validation
issues.attack: No clean_expires_at() to reject past dates. Owner could create dead-on-arrival invite codes.
issues.response: Valid. Add past-date rejection in clean_expires_at() combined with Issue 1 fix.

issues.title: NotificationPreference hardcoded defaults/schema drift
issues.attack: Form hardcodes 8 fields and to_preferences() defaults instead of reusing model constants. Schema drift risk when types/channels change.
issues.response: Remove fallback defaults from to_preferences() (BooleanField returns False). Keep explicit field declarations — dynamic generation is premature for 8 fields.

issues.title: InviteCodeCreateForm role choices hardcoded
issues.attack: Role choices hardcoded instead of derived from InviteCode.Role model constant.

issues.title: Widget CSS hardcoded/inconsistent with project patterns
issues.attack: Uses focus:ring-indigo-500 and text-[14px] instead of project's focus:ring-primary and text-[15px] pattern.
issues.response: Define INPUT_CSS constant matching project pattern.

issues.title: No test step in plan
issues.attack: Plan goes from creation to commit with no unit tests.
issues.response: Form-only tasks defer testing to view integration in t13/t15. Previous tasks followed same pattern.
